input.destination: A rural region in northern Kenya, approximately 8 hours' drive from Nairobi
input.purpose: Documentary filming about community-led conservation programmes
input.team: Reporter, camera operator, sound recordist (3 people)
input.known_risks: Remote area with limited mobile coverage. Recent security incidents involving cattle rustling. Extreme heat.
input.equipment: Full broadcast camera kit, drone, satellite phone

input.purpose: Two days of interviews for a business feature

input.destination: A small island in the Greek Aegean, accessible only by ferry from Athens
input.purpose: Reporting on a migrant processing centre and interviews with NGO workers and local residents
input.known_risks: Sensitive political topic. Greek authorities have restricted journalist access to migrant centres. Ferry schedules are weather-dependent. Limited accommodation on the island.
